summary: Strict finish criteria are not fully satisfied yet.
reasons: The explicit verify command `test $(export PATH="$HOME/.dotnet:$PATH" && dotnet test FoodTrack.sln --filter "FullyQualifiedName!~FoodTrack.Mobile" --list-tests 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'test host') -ge 1` fails exactly as written with exit code 1.

The mobile project under `src/FoodTrack.Mobile/` is not a real .NET MAUI project yet: `FoodTrack.Mobile.csproj` uses `Microsoft.NET.Sdk` with `TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework>` and no `UseMaui`/MAUI target frameworks.
`src/FoodTrack.Mobile/Stubs/MauiControls.cs` shows the mobile layer is currently backed by local MAUI compatibility stubs rather than actual MAUI controls/runtime.
Fresh `dotnet build FoodTrack.sln` succeeded and fresh filtered tests passed 31 tests, but the current finish criteria require all verify commands to succeed, not just some of them.
`.plan/TODO.md` is clean and `.plan/WORK_LOCK` is absent, so the remaining gap is verification/true MAUI compliance rather than backlog cleanup.
instructions_for_worker: Make every verify command in `.plan/FINISH_CRITERIA.md` pass exactly as written and replace the stubbed `src/FoodTrack.Mobile` project with a real MAUI project that satisfies the strict mobile requirement.
missing_checks: real .NET MAUI project verification for `src/FoodTrack.Mobile` rather than a stubbed net8.0 library
